kitchen.title: Kitchen
kitchen.description: The Kitchen at the Ken Sargent House is the heart of our home, just as it is in many of your homes, only bigger. It’s more than just a place to cook—it’s a gathering spot where patients & their families can prepare meals together, creating a sense of normalcy and connection. This communal space fosters togetherness, allowing families to share experiences, support one another, and build bonds. The kitchen also provides a cost-effective alternative to dining out, easing financial strain while offering emotional comfort through familiar, home-cooked meals. Your support ensures that this vital space remains a cornerstone of care and continues to nourish both bodies and hearts.

entrance-to-the-base-level.title: Entrance to the Base Level
entrance-to-the-base-level.description: Approach the base-level entrance of Ken Sargent House from the landscaped grounds. This lower entry provides access to guest spaces on the building's foundation level.

comfort-corner.title: Comfort Corner
comfort-corner.description:
Nestled in the heart of the Ken Sargent House is a small but meaningful comfort corner—a place designed to bring families together through shared experiences, much like the close-knit region of Northwestern Alberta. 

This shared area provides emotional support, fostering a sense of belonging and connection, especially during tough times. Here, families can relax, share stories, and find strength in each other. It’s a space to create bonds that transcend their stay, offering comfort and reassurance that they’re never alone. 

Your support helps us maintain this vital area, ensuring that families can continue to find peace, community, and hope within our walls.

main-entrance.title: Main Entrance
main-entrance.description: Arrive at the ground-level main entrance of Ken Sargent House. Glass doors open directly into the reception lobby, with an accessible ramp and railings on the left side of the front stairs. Illuminated welcome signage helps visitors find their way, whether arriving during the day or in the evening.

popup.title: Parking Lot
popup.body:
Visitor parking at Ken Sargent House provides convenient, accessible spaces for families and guests arriving for short or extended stays. This naming opportunity will recognize partners who help keep welcome and comfort within easy reach from the moment guests arrive.

Naming details for the parking area will be announced soon. Contact the Foundation to register your interest.

reception.title: Reception
reception.description:
The reception at Ken Sargent House offers a warm and welcoming atmosphere for all guests. As the first point of contact, our reception team is dedicated to providing excellent customer service, ensuring that every visitor feels comfortable and well-informed.

The reception area is designed with a blend of modern comfort and classic charm, featuring stylish seating, soft lighting, and a cozy ambiance. Whether you're checking in, seeking assistance, or just looking for information, our friendly staff is always ready to help.

overall.title: Overview
overall.description:
A Ken Sargent house is designed to blend comfort with modern elegance, and its covered porch is no exception. Extending seamlessly from the home's main living space, the covered porch serves as a perfect transition between indoors and outdoors.

Built with high-quality wood or composite materials, the porch is both stylish and durable, capable of withstanding various weather conditions. Large glass doors often lead to this space, allowing natural light to flood the interior while providing easy access to fresh air.

A signature feature of a Ken Sargent covered porch is its thoughtful design, incorporating subtle lighting and an inviting atmosphere. Whether used for relaxing mornings with a cup of coffee, sunset gatherings with friends, or peaceful moments under the stars, this porch enhances the overall experience of the home.

Designed with both aesthetics and functionality in mind, the covered porch is a place where architecture and nature come together, creating a serene and inviting retreat.

main-floor.description:

basement.description:

covered-porch.title: Covered Porch
covered-porch.description: Explore Covered Porch as part of the Ken Sargent House virtual tour.

dining-area.title: Dining Area
dining-area.description: The Dining Area at the Ken Sargent House is for more than sharing a meal, it’s a space for connection and togetherness. It’s where families gather around the table, share stories, and support each other. As the hub of the home, it provides more than just nourishment—it’s a place of comfort, where conversations are plenty and family and friends can visit, play games, and share in conversation. Your support helps us maintain this special space, ensuring that families have a place to eat, share, and build lasting memories during their time here.

family-patient-communal-space.title: Family & Patient Communal Space
family-patient-communal-space.description:
The Family & Patient Communal Space at the Ken Sargent House is a haven designed to bring families together during difficult times to find comfort and connection, building a strong sense of community. This shared space fosters support and camaraderie, helping families navigate difficult times with emotional resilience. It’s a place, in the main area of the home where families share experiences, offer advice, and build lasting relationships that extend beyond their stay. 

This is where the magic of natural support systems are created, where strangers become friends and friends turn into family. Your support helps us maintain this vital space, ensuring families have a safe, supportive environment to heal together.

main-floor-stairs.title: Stairwell
main-floor-stairs.description: The Stairwell connects families and staff to every part of the home, providing a safe and reliable pathway throughout the space. More than just a transition point, it represents movement, access, and continuity in daily life. Your support ensures that this essential connection remains secure, accessible, and welcoming for all.

accessible-larger-suites.title: Accessible & Larger Suites
accessible-larger-suites.description:
At the Ken Sargent House, our two accessible and two larger suites offer families a private sanctuary during their loved one’s medical treatment.

These larger suites provide privacy and comfort, giving families a personal space to rest, recharge, and find solace during challenging times.

The accessible & larger suites include all the basic necessities—two beds, a bathroom with a shower, and storage for personal belongings—making it a true home away from home.

Your support can help us maintain this vital space, offering families a safe, private and comforting environment during their time of need.

suite-a.title: Suite A
suite-a.description:
At the Ken Sargent House, Suite A offers families a private sanctuary on the main level during their loved one’s medical treatment.

This 476 square foot suite provides privacy and comfort, giving families a personal space to rest, recharge, and find solace during challenging times.

With its convenient location near the hospital, Suite A  in the Ken Sargent House reduces travel stress and ensures families can stay close to their loved ones when it matters most.

        The suite includes all the basic necessities—two beds, a bathroom with a bathtub, and storage for personal belongings—making it a true home away from home.

Your support can help us maintain this vital space, offering families a safe and comforting environment during their time of need.

gazebo.title: Gazebo
gazebo.description:
The Gazebo at the Ken Sargent House offers a peaceful retreat, set against the serene backdrop of Northwestern Alberta’s breathtaking natural beauty. Surrounded by the quiet tranquility of the outdoors, it’s a space where families can unwind, reflect, and find peace amidst the challenges they face. 

For caregivers and families alike, this space provides the perfect opportunity to recharge, away from the clinical environment. Whether you’re sitting in the stillness of winter or enjoying the cool northern breeze, the Gazebo is a sanctuary that promotes healing and connection. 

Your support ensures that this tranquil retreat continues to serve families in need of respite.

pantry.title: Pantry
pantry.description:
At the Ken Sargent House, our pantry is more than a place to store food—it’s a vital resource for families. The pantry offers convenient access to dry goods, snacks, and personal food storage, ensuring that families can focus on what matters most—being there for one another. 

It also alleviates financial burdens by offering nutritious, cost-effective options that support the well-being of our families. Whether it’s the long winters or the unpredictable weather, the pantry helps families maintain healthy eating habits during challenging times. 

Your support allows us to continue offering this essential service, providing comfort and relief when it’s needed most.

playroom.title: Playroom
playroom.description:
The Playroom at the Ken Sargent House offers a burst of joy and creativity for children, allowing them to engage in playful activities and foster growth, even in the midst of adversity. 

In Northwestern Alberta, where winters are long and isolation can set in, the Playroom is a vital space where children can reduce stress, express themselves, and experience moments of happiness. This safe and welcoming space encourages social interactions, while giving children a sense of normalcy and fun. 

Your support helps keep this haven alive, offering children and families a much-needed escape and the chance to create memories of joy, even in difficult times.

main-floor-corridor.title: Corridor
main-floor-corridor.description: Explore Main Floor Corridor as part of the Ken Sargent House virtual tour.

staff-room.title: Staff Room
staff-room.description: Explore Staff Room as part of the Ken Sargent House virtual tour.

laundry.title: Laundry
laundry.description:
The Laundry Room at the Ken Sargent House is more than just a convenience—it’s one less hurdle a family has to navigate. It offers cost savings by eliminating the need for external laundry services and ensures hygiene and comfort with clean clothes and bedding. The laundry room, located in the basement of the home is accessible by elevator and is free for families to use. 

Your support keeps this essential space running, providing comfort and care when families need it most.

basement-corridor.title: Corridor
basement-corridor.description: Explore Basement Corridor as part of the Ken Sargent House virtual tour.

social-space.title: Social Space
social-space.description:
Welcome to the Social Space at the Ken Sargent House—a space designed to bring families together. Grab a friend and make yourselves a hot coffee or tea, relax in the comfort of this space that encourages connection, allowing families to share experiences, form supportive relationships, and find comfort in one another. It's a place where stress melts away, and emotional support thrives, as families understand and uplift each other.

Whether you’re spending quality time with loved ones or engaging in house activities, the social space promotes well-being and reduces stress. 

The social space is a place to build lasting relationships, and natural support systems to guide families through their journey and create bonds that extend far beyond one’s stay.

quite-space.title: Quite Space
quite-space.description:
Shhhhhhhh, join us in The Quiet Space at the Ken Sargent House, a peaceful retreat—much like the stillness of Northwestern Alberta’s vast wilderness. Here, families can reflect, recharge, and regain their mental and emotional strength. 

Whether it’s a moment of silence to gather their thoughts, nestled up with a good book or a quiet conversation, this space provides the calm needed to stay centered and focused. The Quiet Space encourages self-care and offers a refuge where families can process their emotions and find renewal. 

Your support ensures that this sanctuary remains a calming and restorative space for families to gather strength.

suite-b.title: Suite B
suite-b.description:
At the Ken Sargent House, we have 17 suites that offer families a private sanctuary during their loved one’s medical treatment.

These suites provide privacy and comfort, giving families a personal space to rest, recharge, and find solace during challenging times.

These suites includes all the basic necessities—with either one or two beds, a bathroom with a shower or bathtub and storage for personal belongings—making it a true home away from home.

Your support can help us maintain this vital space, offering families a safe, private and comforting environment during their time of need.

second-floor-comfort-corner.title: Comfort Corner
second-floor-comfort-corner.description:
Nestled in the heart of the Ken Sargent House is a small but meaningful comfort corner—a place designed to bring families together through shared experiences, much like the close-knit region of Northwestern Alberta. 

This shared area provides emotional support, fostering a sense of belonging and connection, especially during tough times. Here, families can relax, share stories, and find strength in each other. It’s a space to create bonds that transcend their stay, offering comfort and reassurance that they’re never alone. 

Your support helps us maintain this vital area, ensuring that families can continue to find peace, community, and hope within our walls.

fitness-room.title: Fitness Room
fitness-room.description:
The Fitness Room at the Ken Sargent House is more than just a place to work out—it’s a place where families can build strength, resilience, and hope in the face of adversity. 

During the long northern winters or the endless daylight of summer, staying active is key to mental and physical well-being. Our fitness space helps families reduce stress, stay strong, and cope with the emotional strain of challenging times. 

For caregivers, it’s an essential outlet, offering a place to release tension and restore balance. 

Your support keeps this space active, enabling families to take care of themselves as they care for their loved ones.

corridor.title: Corridor
corridor.description: Explore Corridor as part of the Ken Sargent House virtual tour.

wash-room.title: Wash Room
wash-room.description: Explore Wash Room as part of the Ken Sargent House virtual tour.
